plugins.name: Public API Plugin
plugins.description: Public, API-key-authenticated HTTP surface for Peckboard, served as a WASM plugin. Lets external clients list projects, list/create cards, and manage scoped API keys over a /plugin-api/* prefix.
plugins.author: PeckBoard

plugins.name: Diff Viewer
plugins.description: Pick any git repo in the project/session folder, then get a side-by-side viewer/editor for every file that differs from origin/main, including new files and images, served as a WASM plugin.
plugins.author: PeckBoard

plugins.name: Experts
plugins.description: Experts feature for Peckboard (knowledge / question / PM experts, MCP tools, and UI), served as a WASM plugin.
plugins.author: PeckBoard

plugins.name: Session Control
plugins.description: Control another Peckboard session from a session: interrupt, terminate the agent, clear, and send messages/images. Served as a WASM plugin.
plugins.author: PeckBoard

plugins.name: Playwright Tests
plugins.description: LogRocket-style replay of recorded browser test runs (per-step frames, time-scaled playback, action event track), with a Playwright Tests page below Sessions.
plugins.author: PeckBoard

plugins.name: Pre-hatcher
plugins.description: Pre-warms chat messages before they reach the main model: each intercepted message first gets a plain opt-in question card (no AI involved) — declining sends it unchanged; accepting has a temp session on a cheaper model (the provider's cheapest priced one, or the model picked in Settings) gather repository context with the full chat transcript in view, ask a clarifying question when the request is ambiguous, and propose an enriched message delivered only after the user approves it on a second plain question card showing the expanded text (declining delivers the original). The research session runs under a configurable library system prompt (default "fable 5"). Research actions stream into the parked message live. Served as a WASM plugin.
plugins.author: PeckBoard

plugins.name: Nginx Proxy Manager
plugins.description: Manage an Nginx Proxy Manager instance from Peckboard sessions: bridges NPM's built-in MCP server (proxy hosts, redirections, streams, certificates, access lists) as MCP tools — npm_status, npm_list_tools, npm_call, npm_configure. Passthrough surface: the tool catalog is discovered live per API-key scope. Requires the http_request permission (outbound HTTP incl. private/LAN targets) to reach a self-hosted NPM. Served as a WASM plugin.
plugins.author: PeckBoard

plugins.name: Kaiad
plugins.description: Manage a Kaiad control plane from Peckboard sessions: bridges Kaiad's hosted MCP server (services & deployments, builds, registry, agents, operators, incidents) as MCP tools — kaiad_status, kaiad_list_tools, kaiad_call, kaiad_configure. Passthrough surface: the tool catalog is discovered live per credential scope (mcp.read/mcp.write). Requires the http_request permission (outbound HTTP incl. private/LAN targets) to reach a self-hosted Kaiad panel. Served as a WASM plugin.
plugins.author: PeckBoard

plugins.name: SSH Fleet
plugins.description: Hold connection details for many SSH hosts (user+password or user+key) and drive them over MCP tools: register hosts, run commands on one host or across the whole fleet, and read/write/edit remote files over SFTP. Ships a live activity dashboard (searchable host picker, per-host and all-hosts views, live polling). SSH runs through native host functions in Peckboard core, so credentials stay in memory and are never written to disk. Served as a WASM plugin.
plugins.author: PeckBoard
